title: Shady's Heropack
description: A modern, optimized superhero experience for 1.20.1 built on Palladium. No bloatware—focused strictly on core hero abilities and high performance.
body:
# 🛡️ Shady's Heropack

**Shady's Heropack** is a refined and **performance-oriented** superhero experience for Minecraft **1.20.1**. Built on the **Palladium** framework, this pack eliminates all "bloatware" to deliver a clean, modern, and high-FPS gameplay.

---

### 🚀 **Key Features**

* 🦸 **Core Hero System:** Powered by **Palladium** and **FSang18's Heroes** for stable and detailed power sets.
* 🦾 **Advanced Tech:** Includes the **Satsu Iron Man Addon** for high-quality armor and flight systems.
* 🏗️ **Base Building:** Design your headquarters with **MrCrayfish’s Furniture**, **Macaw’s Furniture**, and **Chisel**.
* 🎭 **Secret Identity:** Protect your identity with **Fakename** and keep your hero skin consistent via **SkinRestorer**.
* 🌍 **Living World:** Use **CustomNPCs** to create allies or arch-villains in your own comic book universe.

---

### ⚙️ **Technical Specs**

* 🔥 **Zero Bloat:** Every mod is hand-picked. No "trash" mods—only pure performance.
* ⚡ **Optimization:** High-speed gameplay using **GeckoLib**, **Architectury**, and **Packet Fixer**.
* 🛠️ **World Tools:** Full support for **WorldEdit** and **KubeJS** for ultimate control.

---

### 👨‍💻 **Developer**
* **Lead Developer:** **shady1545**

---

### 📜 **Installation**
Optimized for **1.20.1 Forge**. Allocating **4GB-6GB RAM** is recommended for the best experience.

> **Shady's Heropack: Being a hero isn't a choice, it's a responsibility.**
